violations.text: Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: kitchen cart grill area beneath grill grill side cart 3 shelf unit above hot dog roller. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
One light beneath the hood was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility including inside the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable choppers, knife, food containers in clean storage area) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live small flies in the kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Ecolab PCS monthly. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

A knife observed stored on an unclean surface (top of toaster) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
One vegetable chopper was not in good repair, with teeth missing. Several plastic bins observed with cracks and/or pieces broken off. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the clean storage bins, condiment bins, single service item containers, counters, toaster, large portable fan, storage rack, etc. have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
The dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of trash, litter, leaf litter, and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. Fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and mold. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
The area around the mop sink is in poor repair, pulled away from the wall and needs to be resealed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
